properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a sweet anointing in this sanctuary, There is a stillness in the atmosphere; Come and lay down the burdens you have carried For in the sanctuary, God is here.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is here He is here to break the yoke And lift the heavy burden

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is here He is here to heal the hopeless heart And bless the broken

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh come and lay down The burdens you have carried For in this sanctuary, God is here

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Speak to me Lord Speak to me Lord

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Speak Lord, speak Lord Speak Lord, speak Lord
